theme: reshuffle warehouse pallets across pricey doorways
title: Doorway Tolls: Cost-Routed Pallet Reshuffling
strategies: replicate the checker's own no-SWAP baseline: star-of-transpositions through a temp bay (trivial)
textbook cycle-following: minimal-COUNT star of SWAPs from the smallest-index anchor, blind to doorway cost (greedy)
per-cycle choice between the star and a ring-walk that relays doorway-crossing steps through scratch registers, minimal-COST decomposition (strong)
true minimum-cost program (NP-hard-flavored joint scheduling of register reuse across cycles; open ceiling, uncovered)
